feed.title: The LLM Residency
feed.subtitle: LLM Model Training Residency: from zero to serving. The full cycle, written down every week.

entry.title: The Map of the Territory
entry.summary: Week 0 · Part A. An LLM is one pipeline: data, pretraining, post-training, evals, inference, operations. None of it is magic, and by the end of this program you will have built every stage yourself. Today you train your first one.
